← All ECHO examples

ECHO — α = 0.50 (50/50 split, regatta preset)

Scoring system: ECHO    α (blend factor): 0.50 
Per the IS 2022 guide: "Irish Sailing recommends 75/25 for club racing and
50/50 for regattas and major events." The 50/50 split is the more aggressive
preset — handicaps move twice as far per race compared with the club default.

Same 3-boat fleet as fixture 04 race 1. Compare adjustments: at α=0.25 Boat 1
moved by +0.010051; at α=0.50 it moves by +0.020101 (twice the displacement).

Race 1

Gun time: 12:00:00   α: 0.50   Finishers: 3   ΣHS: 3.070   Σ(1/TE): 0.00081982
RankNameSail # Finish timeTE1/TE Starting HCTPIadjNew H Points
1 Alpha 1 13:00:00 60m 00s 0.00027778 1.0000 60m 00s 1.0402 +0.0201 1.0200 1
2 Bravo 2 13:01:00 61m 00s 0.00027322 1.0200 62m 13s 1.0231 +0.0016 1.0220 2
3 Charlie 3 13:02:00 62m 00s 0.00026882 1.0500 65m 06s 1.0066 -0.0217 1.0280 3

Series standings

RankNameSail #R1TotalNet
1 Alpha 1 1 1 1
2 Bravo 2 2 2 2
3 Charlie 3 3 3 3
